positive: A minimalist, continuous line art illustration depicting a celestial map. Intertwining constellations (Ursa Major, Orion) are formed by delicate, single-weight lines that flow into abstract geometric shapes. Clean white background, black ink only, Scandinavian aesthetic, elegant, meditative.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, color, shading, realism, messy
